title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Oracle India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Oracle India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Oracle India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Oracle India:
Oracle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India!
